title: Adheral Operator (⧉) — Runtime Relation-Coupling Operator
title_vi: Toán tử Bám Vật Thể — Runtime Bám Dính Quan Hệ

objective.decision: A⧉B holds when co-existence, symmetry, bidirectional reconstructability, elasticity, and invariance jointly exceed configured thresholds.

upgrade_summary: Adds numeric axiom scores rather than boolean-only checks.
Adds bidirectional reconstruction-error scoring using embeddings, reconstructed embeddings, or learned hooks.
Adds elasticity stress-test across distance and relation samples.
Adds invariance check using signatures or transformed embeddings.
Adds weighted total score and relation modes: adheral, partial, reject.
Adds ranked pair scanning for Adheral(S).
Adds trace export, O.i intermediate record, demo, and self-tests.

axioms_runtime.pass_condition: rel_AB and rel_BA are strong, and directional delta ≤ tolerance
Both Φ_A→B and Φ_B→A exist and reconstruction error is acceptable

axioms_runtime.score: stress score from sample count, distance range, relation floor, and relation variance
axioms_runtime.pass_condition: relation remains above floor under nontrivial distance variation

axioms_runtime.score: signature preservation or transformed-embedding drift score
axioms_runtime.pass_condition: τ(A), τ(B) preserve relation identity within drift threshold

decision_modes.partial: totalScore ≥ 0.55 but one or more strict conditions are incomplete

operatorology_role.classification: Epic Core Candidate upgraded toward Epic Core runtime
relation_to_S0_HZSO_BZDO: 𝓢₀ extracts invariant foundation before relation comparison.
HZSO can pull unstable relation states toward symmetry-compatible form.
BZDO dissolves character when the block or relation no longer has valid support.
Adheral detects pairs whose relation should be preserved instead of dissolved.
